  1. model

Uses of Package
model

Packages that use model
Package
Description
model
Domain objects for users, sessions, and the social-network graph.
persistence
File-based persistence for social-network data.
service
Business services for authentication, users, friendships, and recommendations.
ui.javafx
JavaFX application setup and shared controller context.
ui.javafx.controller
JavaFX controllers for the application's FXML views.
  • Classes in model used by model
    Class
    Description
    User
    Represents a social-network user and the identifiers of that user's friends.
  • Classes in model used by persistence
    Class
    Description
    SocialNetwork
    Stores users and undirected friendships, with secondary indexes for workplace and hometown searches.
  • Classes in model used by service
    Class
    Description
    Session
    Stores the identity of the user currently authenticated in the application.
    SocialNetwork
    Stores users and undirected friendships, with secondary indexes for workplace and hometown searches.
    User
    Represents a social-network user and the identifiers of that user's friends.

    Class
    Description
    Session
    Stores the identity of the user currently authenticated in the application.
    SocialNetwork
    Stores users and undirected friendships, with secondary indexes for workplace and hometown searches.
